g.title: ### Sharding Strategy Split weight matrix $W \in \mathbb{R}^{H \times 4H}$ into $N$ shards along columns: $W = [W_0, W_1, \dots, W_{N-1}]$ where $W_i \in \mathbb{R}^{H \times \frac{4H}{N}}$.
### Sharding Strategy Split weight matrix $W \in \mathbb{R}^{4H \times H}$ into $N$ shards along rows: $W = [W_0^T, W_1^T, \dots, W_{N-1}^T]^T$ where $W_i \in \mathbb{R}^{\frac{4H}{N} \times H}$.
### Implementation Detail $Y = \sum_{i=0}^{N-1} P_i$ Executed via NCCL AllReduce.

ul.li: RowParallel Input: Requires sharding on Dim 1 (the 4H dimension)
Result: The layout matches perfectly. We avoid an All-Gather between Linear layers.
Total Cost: Exactly one All-Reduce per MLP block.

g.text: ■ Replicated Tensor: Identical on all TP ranks
▣ Sharded Tensor: Partitioned along hidden/ffn dimension
✓ Local: Operation performed in isolation per rank

g.title: ### Sharding Strategy Split weight matrix $W \in \mathbb{R}^{H \times 4H}$ into $N$ shards along columns: $W = [W_0, W_1, \dots, W_{N-1}]$ where $W_i \in \mathbb{R}^{H \times \frac{4H}{N}}$.
### Sharding Strategy Split weight matrix $W \in \mathbb{R}^{4H \times H}$ into $N$ shards along rows: $W = [W_0^T, W_1^T, \dots, W_{N-1}^T]^T$ where $W_i \in \mathbb{R}^{\frac{4H}{N} \times H}$.
### Implementation Detail $Y = \sum_{i=0}^{N-1} P_i$ Executed via NCCL AllReduce.
